refund_policy.policy_text: Unfortunately, due to the intangibleness of the services provided and the lack of customer activity monitoring, IPBurger does not offer refunds. However, a store credit may be issued under certain circumstances. Chargebacks without prior contact = account suspension and forfeiture of refund eligibility.
conditions: store credit possible under certain circumstances

support.response_time: Trustpilot reviews praise fast, helpful support

notes: ⚠️ NO-REFUND POLICY IS MAJOR RISK for resellers. If IPs don't work, you absorb the loss. Trustpilot 4.4/434 reviews — excellent support but terrible refund policy. Scamalytics 0 (clean). Premium pricing ($11.29/GB resi) makes no-refund policy even riskier. AVOID as primary reseller. OK as backup with small test orders only.
